title: lesquerella kingii var. sherwoodii
intro: Lesquerella kingii var. sherwoodii, also known as Sherwood's bladderpod, is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, as well as protection against infections and oxidative stress. Lesquerella kingii var. sherwoodii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
